node.text:
Around 9:30pm, @manish31089 learned about three meteor showers happening that night – the Southern Delta Aquariids, Alpha Capricornids, and Perseids – and immediately went to the darkest place he could think of. He set his #Pixel6 Pro to Astrophotography in Night Sight mode, set it up on a tripod, and let the camera do the rest. 

The most important part of stargazing and documenting the sky? “Remember to look up at the stars and not down at your feet.”

Show us your photos of starry night skies using #TeamPixel. 

*See g.co/pixel/astrophotography to learn more.

node.text:
Your Pixel just got even better—with our 10th Feature Drop*

📸 Capture moments even in the dark with Night Sight in Snapchat.†

📞 Wait Times lets you see current and estimated wait times for calls to businesses, so you can spend less time on hold. Direct My Call lets you see the business menu options on screen and press the one you need to talk to.§

🔊 For calls using Live Caption for calls, you can now type a response and your Pixel will read it aloud to the person on the other end.‖

🔋Check your battery levels across multiple devices with the new battery widget.¶

👀 At A Glance lets you keep track of important content, like your Pixel Buds battery level, without unlocking your phone.¶

😀 Custom text stickers give you options for turning your text into fun, illustrated stickers with a tap.‡

📱Live Translate interpreter mode can now real-time translate into Spanish, Italian, and French. And Live Caption can now translate captions into Spanish.Δ

🖼️ Make your Pixel your own with wallpapers from artist Manjit Thapp for International Women’s Day.

Browse the Pixel Store at our link in bio.

*Your Pixel will generally receive Feature Drops during the applicable Android update and support periods for the phone. See g.co/pixel/updates for details. Availability of some Feature Drops may vary.
†Available only on Pixel 6 and Pixel 6 Pro
§US only. English only. Available only on Pixel 3a or newer phones. Toll-free numbers only. May not detect every on-hold scenario.
‖Available only on Pixel 6 and Pixel 6 Pro. Not available in all languages or countries. Not available on all media or apps. See g.co/help/livecaption for details.
¶Requires compatible Bluetooth®-connected device (sold separately). Pixel Buds sold separately. The Bluetooth® word mark is a registered trademark owned by the Bluetooth SIG, Inc.
‡Requires U.S. English version of Gboard.
ΔAvailable only on Pixel 6 and Pixel 6 Pro. Not available in all languages or countries. Not available on all media or apps. See g.co/pixel/livetranslate.

node.text: The Google #Pixel6 with Real Tone helps people of all skin tones to be #SeenOnPixel beautifully and authentically. The improved auto-exposure shows more accurate brightness on NBA HBCU Classic athlete @__Sherwyn‘s face ahead of the @NBA All-Star 2022.

node.text: Historically, cameras haven't accurately represented darker skin tones. The Google #Pixel6 with Real Tone uses an improved face detection model to take portraits that look like you, even in low light as seen in this portrait of @NBA HBCU Classic athlete @bryce_34_harris. #SeenOnPixel

node.text:
Google #Pixel10a is the real deal, for a real deal. 

📷 Snap extraordinary pics with the best phone camera under $500¹ and a stacked suite of comprehensive editing tools. 
🙌 Relax knowing the Pixel 10a is the most durable Pixel A-series phone yet and 7 years of upgrades keeps it feeling new for a long time.² 
💡 Get ideas about what you’re seeing through live back-and-forth chats with Gemini.³ 
⚡ Take longer breaks from the charging station with more than 30 hours of battery life on a single charge, and up to 120 hours with Extreme Battery saver.⁴ 
🆘 Get emergency help without a signal with Satellite SOS, available on the Pixel A-Series for the first time.⁵ 

You’ll be surprised by how much you get with Google Pixel 10a. Learn more at GoogleStore.com 

¹Among smartphones under $500 (MSRP) in markets where Pixel 10a is sold. Based on third-party evaluation. 
²Your Pixel will generally receive Pixel Drops during the applicable Android update and support periods for the phone. See g.co/pixel/updates for details. Availability of some Pixel Drops may vary by phone and device model. 
³Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. 18+. 
⁴Battery life depends upon many factors and usage of certain features will decrease battery life. Actual battery life may be lower. Over time, Pixel software will manage battery performance to help maintain battery health as your battery ages. See g.co/pixel/battery-tests and g.co/pixel/batteryhealth for details. 
⁵Restrictions apply. Setup required. Service included at no additional charge for the first two years after activation of devices. Available in the US. Connection and response times vary based on location, site conditions, and other factors. See g.co/pixel/satellitesos for details.
